_comment: Auto-discovered remix entry. Built by reading the tfim3 frontier (the prior best, run-tfim3-hwe) via the ingredients pack and designing a problem-specific QAOA ansatz that beats it. The harness re-judges the linked bundle against the canonical hidden reference and checks the metric before ranking.
model_usage: REMIX of the tfim3 frontier — Opus 4.8 read the prior best (1-layer hardware-efficient, gap 0.0143) via bin/ingredients.mjs and designed a problem-specific QAOA p=2 ansatz that beats it
why_it_scores: Remix that takes rank 1 on tfim3: a problem-specific QAOA p=2 ansatz (rzz couplers matching the Ising bonds + an rx mixer) reaches gap 0.000103 to E0 — 138x closer than the hardware-efficient ingredient (0.0143) — at the same 4 two-qubit gates. The frontier moves when a run builds on prior ingredients.
